title: Identifying the media I have finding a better version
display_title: Identifying the media I have finding a better version
wikitext:
[]: Identifying the media I have + finding a better version             Quote Post by ninestraycats » Wed Jun 27, 2012 6:47 pm I have two versions of the Eva TV series. The first are avi files, ~250MB except for the DA cuts which are ~350MB. During the title sequence, the following is overlaid at the top of the screen: A2000A - # [email protected] - Encoded By Black Raw provided by : Chronos [ [email protected] ] #USTEAM version Subtitle corrections by : Rage [ [email protected] ] The subtitles are absolutely god-awful, so I found another rip. These are ~350MB mkv files named zx.eva.renewal[ep-no.].divx511. The subtitles are much much better. However, despite the "renewal" part of the names, eps. 21-24 are not the director's cut. Can anyone help me identify where these two versions were ripped from? Also, can anyone point me to a high-quality version of the series with good subtitles and DA cuts?

[]:             Quote Post by transcendent12 » Wed Jun 27, 2012 6:57 pm higher quality than the official platinum complete dvd subs? I have to say, I wouldn't mind some ISO copies of renewal repacked with english subs, put them behind the DVD's in my official thinpack DVD boxes so I have a 100% definitive english subbed experience. Finding renewal is hard enough, finding straight ISOs is impossible-obviously due to legality etc. I've only seen EOE's renewal, which was certainly a step up over manga's DVD that I have.

[]:             Quote Post by ninestraycats » Wed Jun 27, 2012 7:20 pm transcendent12 wrote: higher quality than the official platinum complete dvd subs?

[]:             Quote Post by transcendent12 » Wed Jun 27, 2012 8:23 pm yeah, plat is basically renewal, it's only the movies we have rubbish versions of outside of Japan. Don't worry about the subs.. I'm not quite up for comparing them at the moment ^^

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jun 27, 2012 10:09 pm the A2000 and zx are both fansubs. I don't know about the A2k source, but the ones I have were pre-renewal. The zx ones you have are from renewal, meaning they're ripped from the remastered video, what is in the states Platinum.

[]:             Quote Post by ninestraycats » Thu Jun 28, 2012 7:25 am Ornette wrote: the A2000 and zx are both fansubs. I don't know about the A2k source, but the ones I have were pre-renewal. The zx ones you have are from renewal, meaning they're ripped from the remastered video, what is in the states Platinum.

[]:             Quote Post by transcendent12 » Thu Jun 28, 2012 4:16 pm they do, on top of the normal ones. I guess maybe they decided for some reason not to include them in your release
